data.body:
ἐκ : prep. + gen. ‘out of, from’
γάρ : causal conj. ‘for, since’ (explanatory)
τοι : affirmative particle ‘let me tell you, you know’ (statement should be familiar to the listener)
Μουσέων : gen. pl. f. μοῦσα ‘muse’ (with synizesis Μουσέ̯ων for the sake of metre)
